/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/muxi_tests.dir/auth_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/muxi_tests.dir/webhook_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/muxi_tests.dir/errors_test.cpp.o -o muxi_tests  ../libmuxi.a ../lib/libgtest_main.a /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libcurl.tbd /opt/homebrew/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libcrypto.dylib ../lib/libgtest.a
